name: dotjez
description: The dotjez skill set — cross-cutting how-to-work-with-an-agent skills.

plugins.name: dotjez
plugins.description: Cross-cutting agent skills: planning and stress-testing ideas, prompt-writing (text and image), don't-trust-memory verification (facts, tooling, and visuals), reasoning over images, stranger-testing docs before they ship, delegation and multi-agent orchestration, role agents and self-refining loops, a folders-as-kanban board with a zero-dep web UI, and the occasional step-back reflection.
